channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 74A: signal disruption
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: signal disruption. [On 24.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: signal disruption.
[On 24.05.2026]

item.title: 85A: roadworks
item.description: Because of construction works in the area of Breitenleer Straße the line 85A (school course) is redirected. [Since 17.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the area of Breitenleer Straße the line 85A (school course) is redirected.
[Since 17.02.2026]

item.title: Roadway Hauptstraße from Emmerich-Teuber-Platz and Juchgasse and Apostelgasse to slaughterhouse gas
item.description: Only the existing bus stop at the Rabengasse will be moved locally. [Since 09.03.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Only the existing bus stop at the Rabengasse will be moved locally.
[Since 09.03.2026]

item.title: Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof ↔ Wien Heiligenstadt
item.description: construction works means that between Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof and Wien Heiligenstadt Station (U) from 14.12.2025 to 01.07.2026 (03:00 o'clock) there are no S40 and R40 trains. [Since 24.03.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works means that between Wien Franz-Josefs-Bahnhof and Wien Heiligenstadt Station (U) from 14.12.2025 to 01.07.2026 (03:00 o'clock) there are no S40 and R40 trains.
[Since 24.03.2026]

item.title: REX 7: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Flughafen Wien
item.description: construction works allows between Flughafen Wien station and Wolfsthal station on 19.02.2026 on 19.03.2026 on 16.04.2026 on 21.05.2026 and 18.06.2026 … [Since 07.01.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works allows between Flughafen Wien station and Wolfsthal station on 19.02.2026 on 19.03.2026 on 16.04.2026 on 21.05.2026 and 18.06.2026 …
[Since 07.01.2026]

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Felixdorf
item.description: Due to construction works, between Vienna Hbf (U) and Felixdorf station on 10.02.2026 on 10.03.2026 on 14.04.2026 on 12.05.2026 on 09.06.2026 on 14.07.2026 on 11.08.2026 on … [Since 19.12.2025]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Vienna Hbf (U) and Felixdorf station on 10.02.2026 on 10.03.2026 on 14.04.2026 on 12.05.2026 on 09.06.2026 on 14.07.2026 on 11.08.2026 on …
[Since 19.12.2025]

item.title: Wien Meidling ↔ Wien Floridsdorf
item.description: construction works allows between Wien Meidling station (U) and Wien Floridsdorf station (U) from 07.04.2026 (23:30 clock) to 08.04.2026 (03:52 clock), from 05.05.2026 … [Since 16.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works allows between Wien Meidling station (U) and Wien Floridsdorf station (U) from 07.04.2026 (23:30 clock) to 08.04.2026 (03:52 clock), from 05.05.2026 …

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Flughafen Wien
item.description: Because of construction works, between Wien Floridsdorf station (U) and Flughafen Wien station from 01.06.2026 to 19.06.2026 (both Saturday, Sunday and holiday) some … [Since 04.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works, between Wien Floridsdorf station (U) and Flughafen Wien station from 01.06.2026 to 19.06.2026 (both Saturday, Sunday and holiday) some …
[Since 04.02.2026]

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Flughafen Wien
item.description: Due to construction works, between Flughafen Wien Bahnhof and Vienna Railway Station (U) the RJ 820 train runs from 13.04.2026 to 26.05.2026 (from Monday to Thursday) with changed journey times. [Since 16.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works, between Flughafen Wien Bahnhof and Vienna Railway Station (U) the RJ 820 train runs from 13.04.2026 to 26.05.2026 (from Monday to Thursday) with changed journey times.
[Since 16.02.2026]
